violations.text: Molluscan Shellfish tags did not have all of the required information. Date of last item served was lacking. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized; ice disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026
A pan of cooked red peppers was observed with date mark exceeding 7 days. PIC disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026
A leak was observed at the faucets at the steam kettles and the faucet of the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2026
The hand-washing sink in the dish wash area was lacking paper towels. PIC stated new dispenser was being installed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025
The following were observed not in good repair: -ice machine observed with the ice bin lip with cracked plastic -gaskets on reach-in refrigerator. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025
The hand washing sink in the dishwash area was observed in poor repair. PIC stated repair has been scheduled. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

The following were observed in poor repair: -walk-in air curtains -missing ceiling tiles over dish machine. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety licensed with RIDOH Center for Food Protection. PIC stated that they are in process of completing their license at this time. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2024
The ice machine located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Inspector observed cracks in plastic around the opening of the ice bin. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine, stand mixer, and can opener base have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024
Leaks observed at faucets of the coffee area dump sink and the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024
The hot water faucet on the hand wash sink in the dish room is in poor repair, observed nonfunctional at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024

Grease and debris observed on the floor of the grease receptable area of the trash room. Refuse areas are to be maintained clean and free of debris to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the dish room. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024

The insulation on the pipe at the dish washer (over clean/sanitized dish exit) is in poor repair, with cracks and frayed insulation tape observed. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024
